task_completion.description: Set the AUTOTUNE_AGGR parameter to 0.05 in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter editor is visible, AUTOTUNE_AGGR is searched or located, and its value is set to 0.05.

task_completion.description: Set the AUTOTUNE_AXES parameter to 3.0 in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter editor is visible, AUTOTUNE_AXES is searched or located, and its value is set to 3 (or 3.0).

task_completion.description: Set the RC7_OPTION parameter to 17.0 in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter editor is visible, RC7_OPTION is searched or located, and its value is set to 17 (or 17.0).

task_completion.description: Set the ATC_RAT_RLL_FLTT parameter to 10.0 in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter editor is visible, ATC_RAT_RLL_FLTT is searched or located, and its value is set to 10 (or 10.0).

task_completion.description: Set the ATC_RAT_PIT_FLTT parameter to 10.0 in QGroundControl.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QGroundControl GUI to modify the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QGroundControl application window open, specifically navigating to the Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu, rather than using terminal commands (like MAVProxy) to set parameters.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the specification document to identify the required parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (e.g., cat, less) is shown displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/autotune_spec.txt.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the parameters within the application and did not just type the expected answers into a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Parameter changes are clearly visible within the QGroundControl interface parameter list, with the input fields showing the updated values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/autotune_spec.txt. The agent must set the following 6 ArduPilot parameters in QGroundControl: AUTOTUNE_AGGR = 0.05, AUTOTUNE_AXES = 3.0, RC7_OPTION = 17.0, ATC_RAT_RLL_FLTT = 10.0, ATC_RAT_PIT_FLTT = 10.0, and INS_GYRO_FILTER = 20.0.
